registryName: Engineering Core V1 EnergyPlus / ASHRAE 140-style Validation Case Registry
purpose: Future comparative validation registry. This is not exact EnergyPlus parity and not ASHRAE 140 certification.
requiredNonClaims: Does not claim exact EnergyPlus numerical parity.
Does not claim ASHRAE 140 validation coverage.
Does not claim full ISO 52016 node/matrix solver parity.

cases.name: Single zone transmission-only heating smoke case
cases.source: Offline committed reference fixture placeholder; real EnergyPlus model to be added in future validation milestone.
cases.weatherSource: Constant winter outdoor temperature synthetic fixture.
cases.geometry: Single-zone rectangular box with opaque envelope and no windows.
cases.envelope: Simple U-value envelope, no thermal bridge detail, no detailed ground model.
cases.hvacControl: Ideal heating load, fixed heating setpoint, no cooling.
assumptions: Ideal load behavior only; no plant simulation.
knownDifferences: AssistantEngineer uses engineering component formulas and simplified hourly balance.
EnergyPlus uses its own zone heat-balance algorithms and timestep handling.
Exact watt-by-watt parity is not expected.
nonClaims: Does not claim exact EnergyPlus numerical parity.
Does not claim ASHRAE 140 validation coverage.
Does not claim full ISO 52016 node/matrix solver parity.

cases.name: Single zone solar cooling smoke case
cases.source: Offline committed reference fixture placeholder; real EnergyPlus model to be added in future validation milestone.
cases.weatherSource: Synthetic summer weather with daytime solar profile.
cases.geometry: Single-zone rectangular box with one south-facing window.
cases.envelope: Simple U-value envelope with simplified SHGC window.
cases.hvacControl: Ideal cooling load, fixed cooling setpoint, no heating.
assumptions: Ideal cooling load behavior only; no plant simulation.
knownDifferences: AssistantEngineer does not model detailed EnergyPlus solar distribution.
AssistantEngineer does not model detailed glazing optics.
Exact hourly solar parity is not expected.
nonClaims: Does not claim exact EnergyPlus numerical parity.
Does not claim ASHRAE 140 validation coverage.
Does not claim full optical glazing or EnergyPlus solar distribution parity.

cases.name: Single zone internal gains cooling smoke case
cases.source: Offline committed reference fixture placeholder; real EnergyPlus model to be added in future validation milestone.
cases.geometry: Single-zone rectangular box with no windows.
cases.envelope: Simple envelope with low transmission load.
cases.hvacControl: Ideal cooling load, fixed cooling setpoint.
knownDifferences: AssistantEngineer internal gains are sensible-only in v1.
Latent heat and humidity are intentionally out of scope.
Detailed EnergyPlus heat storage/distribution behavior is not claimed.
nonClaims: Does not claim exact EnergyPlus numerical parity.
Does not claim ASHRAE 140 validation coverage.
Does not claim latent or moisture validation coverage.

cases.name: Lightweight vs heavyweight envelope sensitivity
cases.source: Future ASHRAE 140-style comparative case, not certification.
cases.geometry: Single-zone box with identical geometry and two thermal mass variants.
cases.envelope: Lightweight and heavyweight envelope comparison with same nominal U-values where practical.
cases.hvacControl: Ideal heating/cooling load with fixed setpoints.

metrics.name: Cooling mass response
metrics.direction: heavyweight case changes peak cooling timing/magnitude directionally

metrics.name: Heating mass response
metrics.direction: heavyweight case changes peak heating timing/magnitude directionally

assumptions: Thermal mass behavior is simplified in Engineering Core V1.
knownDifferences: AssistantEngineer simplified hourly RC model does not claim full ISO 52016 matrix parity.
EnergyPlus heat balance and thermal mass modeling are more detailed.
Directional sensitivity is the first validation target.
nonClaims: Does not claim exact EnergyPlus numerical parity.
Does not claim ASHRAE 140 validation coverage.
Does not claim full ISO 52016 node/matrix solver parity.

cases.name: Window orientation solar sensitivity
cases.source: Future ASHRAE 140-style comparative case, not certification.
cases.geometry: Single-zone box with one window moved between orientations.
cases.envelope: Same opaque envelope and same window properties across orientation variants.
cases.internalGains: No internal gains or fixed sensible gains depending on fixture.
cases.hvacControl: Ideal cooling load with fixed cooling setpoint.

metrics.name: Orientation cooling response
metrics.direction: cooling load changes directionally with solar orientation

metrics.name: Solar gain response
metrics.direction: window solar gains respond to orientation

assumptions: No detailed EnergyPlus solar distribution parity claim.
knownDifferences: EnergyPlus may model detailed solar distribution and glazing optics.
Directional sensitivity is expected before numeric parity.
nonClaims: Does not claim exact EnergyPlus numerical parity.
Does not claim ASHRAE 140 validation coverage.
Does not claim full optical glazing or EnergyPlus solar distribution parity.
